creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

you probably have an old module that is still using this symbol. I have 
this with a highpoint controller as well. This is not a problem. In 
addition please consider sending your "problem reports" to the current 
mailinglist for discussion first instead of opening loads of PR tickets 
(which might or might not be required; but lets first investigate the 
problem to get clear information).
